name: Cronograma Creator
description: Interactive Gantt chart / schedule builder. AI agents can build a schedule with a single HTTP POST (or GET fallback) and hand the user a short share URL — no browser, no auth required.

get.description: Fallback for agents that cannot POST. Same validation, rate limit and limits as POST.

queryParams.title: string (optional, URL-encoded, max 200 chars)
queryParams.format: 'text' | 'json' (default 'json'). 'text' returns just the URL as text/plain.
queryParams.encoding: 'base64url' (default) | 'gzip-base64url'. Use gzip for large states (CDN limits URL to ~16-32 KB).

errors.400: invalid request, missing 's', invalid encoding/format, invalid base64url/UTF-8/JSON, or invalid state
errors.414: Cloudflare returns 414 Request-URI Too Large when GET URL exceeds ~16-32 KB. Switch to encoding=gzip-base64url or POST.
errors.429: rate limit: 30 shares per IP per hour

shareEndpoint.lifetime: Anonymous shares expire 90 days after creation.

c.description: Short ID of a publicly-shared cronograma (created via the share endpoint). Loads it from Supabase on page load.

autoexport.description: Auto-export on page load. Result written to #autoexport-result as JSON.

mode.description: Agent mode: disables modals, animations, and non-essential UI interactions. Deterministic render.

methods.name: createFromJSON
methods.description: Load a schedule from JSON string or object

methods.name: selfTest
methods.description: Run self-test and return results JSON

domElements.#app-test-state: Always present. data-share-url, data-state (full JSON), data-image-ready attributes updated after every render.
domElements.#autoexport-result: Present after ?autoexport= param. Contains JSON result: { success, type, data }.
